title: Section 93
content: No suit or proceeding in any court by or against the mutawalli of a 1[waqf] relating to title to 1[waqf] property or the rights of the mutawalli shall be compromised without the sanction of the Board.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 27 of 2013, s. 4, for "wakf" (w.e.f. 1-11-2013)
